label.purpose: Metadata, pricing, service numbers. Space Mono + uppercase + wide tracking.

shadows.name: hover-glow
shadows.purpose: Subtle cyan glow on card hover.

shadows.name: violet-glow
shadows.purpose: Violet glow on primary button hover.

shadows.name: violet-glow-cta
shadows.purpose: Stronger violet glow for CTA button hover.

motion.name: ease-reveal
motion.purpose: Default easing for scroll reveals and entrances.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid violet pill button for primary CTAs.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #5B2FD4; color: #F0F4FF; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.025em; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(91, 47, 212, 0.8); box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(91, 47, 212, 0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00C8E0; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #00C8E0; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.025em; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 200, 224, 0.5); cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(0, 200, 224, 0.1); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00C8E0; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Service Card
components.description: Dark card with violet border, hover shifts to cyan.
components.html:
01

Website Builds

Premium Next.js 16 + Tailwind v4. Fully responsive, SEO-optimised, 5-day turnaround.

Starting ₹2,999
components.css: .ds-card { background: #0F1228; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(91, 47, 212, 0.15); padding: 32px; min-height: 200px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; transition: border-color 0.5s, box-shadow 0.5s; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: rgba(0, 200, 224, 0.3); box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(0, 200, 224, 0.08); } .ds-card-index { font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: rgba(91, 47, 212, 0.4); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 20px; color: #F0F4FF; margin-top: 20px; transition: color 0.3s; } .ds-card:hover .ds-card-title { color: #00C8E0; } .ds-card-desc { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: rgba(240, 244, 255, 0.5); margin-top: 12px; line-height: 1.7; } .ds-card-price { font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: rgba(91, 47, 212, 0.7); margin-top: 24px; display: inline-block; }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Dark nav with cyan active underline.
components.html: HomeServicesAboutContact
components.css: .ds-nav { background: rgba(13, 16, 36, 0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(24px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(91, 47, 212, 0.1); padding: 0 24px; height: 64px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 32px; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.025em; color: rgba(240, 244, 255, 0.6); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.3s; position: relative; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: rgba(240, 244, 255, 0.9); } .ds-nav-link.ds-active { color: #00C8E0; } .ds-nav-link.ds-active::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -4px; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px; background: #00C8E0; border-radius: 2px; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00C8E0; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Tag / Badge
components.description: Coming Soon badge with muted styling.
components.css: .ds-tag { font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(240, 244, 255, 0.4); padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(240, 244, 255, 0.1); background: rgba(240, 244, 255, 0.05); }

narrative.overview: A dark-spatial design system built for an AI-powered development agency. The canvas is not black but a tinted deep navy (#07091A) that creates atmosphere without crushing detail. Violet and cyan are used as surgical signals — one accent moment per viewport, never decoration. The typography pairing (Space Grotesk display × Inter body × Space Mono labels) creates an engineering-led editorial feel: precise, technical, but warm enough for local Indian business owners to trust.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-spatial depth (ink-space navy, not pure black)
Restrained accent (violet + cyan, one moment per viewport)
Engineering-led aesthetic (mono labels, terminal-like data displays)
Local-first narrative (INR pricing, city names, WhatsApp as primary channel)

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Violet or cyan appears on ≤10% of any given viewport. Their rarity is what makes them signals.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Depth appears only through interaction state changes.

dos: Do use ink-space (#07091A) not pure black for the body background.
Do keep one accent moment per viewport — violet OR cyan, not both competing.
Do use Space Grotesk for headings, Inter for body, Space Mono for labels consistently.
Do use prefers-reduced-motion to disable all animations for vestibular safety.
Do ensure body text meets WCAG AA (4.5:1) contrast against dark backgrounds.
donts: Don't use numbered section markers (01/02/03) as decorative scaffolding above every section.
Don't put a tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section heading.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) for anything — solid colors only.
Don't use identical card grids across multiple sections.
Don't use pure black backgrounds (#000). Use ink-space (#07091A).
Don't use bounce, elastic, or spring animations.
Don't use glassmorphism (frosted glass blur) as a default treatment.
Don't use stock illustrations, rocket icons, or laptop imagery.
Don't create dead affordances — 'View project' must link somewhere or not appear.
Don't overflow text on mobile; test heading clamp at all breakpoints.
